scope.target: Apply low-risk skill boundary corrections identified by the audit.
scope.dependency_radius: Canonical skill specs, runtime wrappers, human-facing guide indexes.
constraints: Keep BDD scenario design separate from AI context governance.
non_goals: Do not delete or merge skills unless the audit clearly proves redundancy.

inputs.architecture_target: Aligned skill names, triggers, descriptions, and indexes.

steps: Apply low-risk canonical spec and wrapper wording updates.
Sync guide indexes if skill routing descriptions change.
validation: Search for stale skill names or conflicting routing text.

results.summary: Applied low-risk skill routing corrections by centralizing ai-context-governance routing and clarifying that BDD test generation is downstream from bdd-gwt-test-designer scenario design.
